f2p_gates.description: cmd/entire/cli/config.go no longer declares the CommitLinkingAlways / CommitLinkingPrompt aliases (anti-pattern check on a code-only view; comments stripped).
cmd/entire/cli/setup.go drops both isFirstSetup branching (4 occurrences in buggy → 0) and the migrateProjectSettings helper (3 → 0). Comments stripped before grepping.

setup.go consolidates the duplicated save blocks into a single shouldUseLocal-aware closure that calls both SaveEntireSettingsLocal and SaveEntireSettings; the closure is invoked >=2 times; the buggy *settings struct-copy + CommitLinking-strip pattern is gone.

manual_commit_hooks.go converts askConfirmTTY from bool -> tri-state result type with >=3 constants (Yes/No/Always), accepts "a"/"always" input, and the prompt hint surfaces the new option (concept coverage: >=4 of 5 signals -- type decl, const block, non-bool return, always-case, hint text).

manual_commit_hooks.go declares an Always-helper that loads existing settings.local.json (LoadFromFile + EntireSettingsLocalFile), sets CommitLinking = ...CommitLinkingAlways, and persists via SaveLocal; the Always result is referenced >=2x (definition + dispatch site). >=3 of 4 signals.

p2p_gates.description: go vet ./cmd/entire/cli/strategy/ ./cmd/entire/cli/ succeeds -- informational only per CLAUDE.md (never zeros reward).
All three target source files still present post-refactor (informational sanity).

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (empty FAIL_TO_PASS -- fallback to overall pass rate scored >=0.99 across all v0.4.3 trials as pure noise). New gates target the canonical [Y/n/a] tri-state commit prompt + commit_linking simplification refactor across 3 source files (config.go, setup.go, strategy/manual_commit_hooks.go). Validated locally: clone https://github.com/entireio/cli at base commit 9d7d0bae7c8e12d024aa120263427bf9f47bba55, run test.sh against buggy baseline -> reward 0.000; apply canonical patch (data-pipeline/artifacts_cli/canonical_patches/7e347585-fd5a-457c-a58b-6a2af0aeef24.json, fidelity=exact, 3 files / +77/-103) -> reward 1.000. Partial graceful: config.go-only fix -> 0.150; hooks.go-only fix -> 0.500. Anti-overfit: G3/G4/G5 use concept coverage (>=3-of-4 or >=4-of-5) rather than identifier-name pinning; closure helper accepted under any name; result-type accepted under any int-typed name. Go line/block comments stripped before all grep/regex checks to avoid false-passes from leftover or commented-out code. P2P_GO_VET + P2P_SOURCE_FILES_EXIST are informational only per scoring_traps.md (p2p_failed = False always).
